data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for integration with onboarding workflows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of integration with onboarding workflows as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of this integration. The linked use case mentions the need for integration, but without any supporting evidence or endpoints to confirm its existence, the requirement is deemed unmet.
gaps: No evidence of integration with onboarding workflows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
